home.h1: Precision Investment Casting Manufacturer in China
home.heroSub: Design-to-delivery casting and CNC machining solutions. ISO 9001:2015 certified, with 25+ years of foundry expertise serving global B2B markets.
home.investmentCastingBody: High-precision lost-wax (investment) casting in stainless steel, carbon steel, and heat-resistant alloys for demanding industrial components.
home.cncBody: 21 advanced machining centers — high-speed CNC milling, EDM, wire-cutting, and 4/5-axis machining for tight-tolerance finished parts.
home.requestQuoteBody: Send drawings or specifications and our engineers will respond with a detailed quotation, typically within 24 hours.

why.experienceBody: Founded in 2000 in Dongying, Shandong, with deep practical know-how in mould design, manufacturing, and online mould testing.
why.certifiedBody: Incoming material inspection, in-process monitoring, shipment inspection, and after-sales service across every production stage.
why.exportBody: Direct export via Qingdao, Shanghai, Tianjin and Dongying ports. Incoterms FOB, CIF, EXW and more.
why.oneStopBody: Independent mould workshop plus deep CNC machining — prototype, casting, machining, and finishing under one roof.

about.title: About Dongying Casting
about.intro: Dongying Wanlong Mechanical Mould Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 in Dongying City, Shandong — the core city of the Yellow River Delta's Shengli Oilfield. The company integrates design, production, prototype assembly, and mould testing, with precision casting moulds as its primary business.
about.historyBody: Through years of development and accumulated experience, we have built comprehensive expertise in mould design, manufacturing, machining, and online mould testing — particularly in automated mould creation and maintenance-free wax mould machining.
about.capacityBody: 101–200 employees and an annual capacity supporting US$50–100 million in output, with peak-season lead times of 1–3 months.
about.teamBody: A professional team of senior design engineers leveraging CAM and CAE simulation software to optimize every mould and component.

products.title: Products
products.intro: Comprehensive casting and machining solutions across multiple metals and alloys.

investment.name: Investment Castings
investment.body: High-precision lost-wax investment castings for complex industrial components.

stainless.name: Stainless Steel Castings
stainless.body: Corrosion-resistant stainless steel casting for marine, food, and medical applications.

carbon.name: Carbon Steel Castings
carbon.body: Durable carbon steel castings for machinery and structural parts.

heat.name: Heat Resistant Steel Castings
heat.body: High-temperature alloy castings for turbine blades, vanes, and nozzles.

cnc.name: CNC Machining Parts
cnc.body: Tight-tolerance finished parts via 4/5-axis CNC, EDM, and wire-cutting.

custom.name: Custom Components
custom.body: Made-to-drawing components from prototype to series production.

industries.title: Industries We Serve
industries.intro: Precision castings and machined parts trusted across demanding sectors worldwide.

quality.title: Quality Control & Certifications
quality.intro: Our commitment to quality is unwavering, built on the ISO 9001:2015 quality management system.
quality.isoBody: ISO 9001:2015 / GB/T 19001 and CE, covering supply-chain management, design and development, and customer information management.
quality.testingBody: CAM and CAE simulation analysis, statistical quality control (SQC), and control charting.
quality.inspectionBody: Incoming material inspection, in-process monitoring, shipment inspection, and after-sales service.

factory.title: Factory & Production Capabilities
factory.intro: An independent mould workshop with deep CNC machining capacity.
factory.equipmentBody: 21 advanced domestic and imported machining centers, including high-speed CNC engraving and milling machines, CNC mirror EDM machines, slow wire-cutting machines, and 4-axis and 5-axis machining centers.

blog.title: Knowledge Center
blog.intro: Technical articles on casting and machining processes.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Tell us about your project. Upload drawings and our engineers will respond with a detailed quotation.
contact.name: Full name
contact.attachment: Attach drawing (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, STEP, DWG, DXF, ZIP, JPG, PNG)
contact.consent: I agree to be contacted regarding my inquiry.
contact.success: Thank you — your inquiry has been received. We will respond shortly.

footer.tagline: Precision investment casting & CNC machining since 2000.
